Returns & Refunds Policy

Last Updated: June 30, 2026

Returns

Customers may request a return within 30 days of receiving their order.

Items must be:

  • Unused
  • In their original condition
  • Returned in the original packaging where possible

Non-Returnable Items

The following items cannot be returned unless faulty:

  • Custom or personalised products
  • Digital products
  • Gift cards

Refunds

Once a returned item has been received and inspected, we will notify you of the outcome.

Approved refunds will be processed to the original payment method within 5–10 business days.

Exchanges

We replace items only if they arrive damaged, defective, or incorrect.

Return Shipping

Customers are responsible for return shipping costs unless the item is faulty or we made an error with the order.

Contact

For returns or refund enquiries, please contact:

Email: support@craftshack.example.com
